subject: [RFC PATCH 3/8] dax/kmem: add the reclaim opt-in (CAP_RECLAIM) for private nodes

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability for private kmem nodes to opt-in to reclaim, which allows them to recover THP (Transparent Huge Pages) compatibility. The opt-in is done through a new attribute called 'reclaim' that can be enabled or disabled. This feature is intended to address issues where high-order allocations fail despite available memory. The patch introduces a helper function KMEM_PRIVATE_CAP_ATTR() for future use and adds the necessary code to enable the reclaim opt-in.
